debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
p_large_enough : Fact (p > 512)
programSize : ℕ
inst✝¹ : NeZero programSize
program : Fin programSize → F p
h_programSize : programSize < p
memorySize : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero memorySize
memory : Fin memorySize → F p
h_memorySize : memorySize < p
⊢ GeneralFormalCircuit.Completeness (F p)
    (Examples.FemtoCairo.femtoCairoStepElaboratedCircuit p inst✝² p_large_enough programSize inst✝¹ program
      h_programSize memorySize inst✝ memory h_memorySize)
    (Examples.FemtoCairo.femtoCairoAssumptions p)

circuit_proof_start [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, femtoCairoAssumptions, femtoCairoStepElaboratedCircuit,
    Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition]

  simp only [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition, Option.bind_eq_bind] at h_spec
  repeat (split at h_spec <;> try contradiction)

  unfold Spec.fetchInstruction Spec.decodeInstruction Spec.dataMemoryAccess Spec.memoryAccess Spec.computeNextState Spec.dataMemoryAddresses at *
  repeat (split at * <;> try contradiction)

  and_intros <;> simp_all [DecodedInstructionType.isEncodedCorrectly, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_union]

    readFromMemoryCircuit, nextStateCircuit]

  rcases h_holds with ⟨raw, h_fetch, decoded, h_decode, v1, h_read1, v2, h_read2, v3, h_read3, h_next⟩
  and_intros
  · simp [Spec.fetchInstruction] at h_fetch; split at h_fetch <;> simp_all

  · simp_all
  · revert h_read1; simp [Spec.dataMemoryAddresses, Spec.dataMemoryAccess, Spec.memoryAccess]; split <;> simp_all
  · simp_all
  · revert h_read2; simp [Spec.dataMemoryAddresses, Spec.dataMemoryAccess, Spec.memoryAccess]; split <;> simp_all
  · simp_all
  · revert h_read3; simp [Spec.dataMemoryAddresses, Spec.dataMemoryAccess, Spec.memoryAccess]; split <;> simp_all
  · simp_all
  · simp [Spec.decodeInstruction] at h_decode; split at h_decode <;> simp_all
  · simp_all

circuit_proof_start [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, femtoCairoAssumptions, Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition]
  simp only [Option.bind_eq_bind, Option.bind_some] at h_spec
  repeat (split at h_spec <;> simp_all)

circuit_proof_start [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, femtoCairoAssumptions, femtoCairoStepElaboratedCircuit,
    Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition, fetchInstructionCircuit, readFromMemoryCircuit, nextStateCircuit, decodeInstructionCircuit,
    Spec.dataMemoryAccess, Spec.dataMemoryAddresses, Spec.fetchInstruction, Spec.decodeInstruction, Spec.computeNextState]

  simp only [Option.bind_eq_bind, Option.bind_some, Option.some.injEq] at h_holds
  rcases h_fetch : Spec.fetchInstruction program input.pc with _ | raw <;> simp [h_fetch] at h_holds
  rcases h_decode : Spec.decodeInstruction raw.rawInstrType with _ | ⟨iType, m1, m2, m3⟩ <;> simp [h_decode] at h_holds
  rcases h_v1 : Spec.dataMemoryAccess memory raw.op1 (DecodedAddressingMode.val m1) input.ap input.fp with _ | v1 <;> simp [h_v1] at h_holds
  rcases h_v2 : Spec.dataMemoryAccess memory raw.op2 (DecodedAddressingMode.val m2) input.ap input.fp with _ | v2 <;> simp [h_v2] at h_holds
  rcases h_v3 : Spec.dataMemoryAccess memory raw.op3 (DecodedAddressingMode.val m3) input.ap input.fp with _ | v3 <;> simp [h_v3] at h_holds
  rcases h_next : Spec.computeNextState (DecodedInstructionType.val iType) v1 v2 v3 input with _ | nextState <;> simp [h_next] at h_holds
  rw [←h_holds]

  and_intros
  · simp_all; split at h_fetch <;> simp_all
  · simp_all; split at h_decode <;> simp_all
  · intros; simp_all [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    split at h_v1 <;> simp_all
    split at h_v1 <;> simp_all
    split at h_v1 <;> simp_all
  · intros; simp_all [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    split at h_v2 <;> simp_all
    split at h_v2 <;> simp_all
    split at h_v2 <;> simp_all
  · intros; simp_all [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    split at h_v3 <;> simp_all
    split at h_v3 <;> simp_all
    split at h_v3 <;> simp_all
  · constructor
    · simp_all; split at h_decode <;> simp_all
    · simp [h_next]

circuit_proof_start [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, femtoCairoAssumptions, Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition]
  simp only [Option.bind_eq_bind, Option.bind_some, Option.some.injEq] at h_spec
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  rename_i raw_instr h_fetch
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  rename_i decoded h_decode
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  rename_i v1 h_read1
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  rename_i v2 h_read2
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  rename_i v3 h_read3
  rename_i h_next
  subst h_spec
  and_intros <;> aesop

circuit_proof_start [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, femtoCairoAssumptions, Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition]
  intros h_assumptions h_spec_exists
  obtain ⟨s', h_spec⟩ := h_spec_exists
  simp only [bind_assoc, Option.bind_eq_bind, Option.bind_some] at h_spec

  -- Fetch
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  simp only [Option.some_bind] at h_spec
  and_intros
  · unfold Spec.fetchInstruction at *; split at * <;> simp_all
  · aesop

  -- Decode
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  simp only [Option.some_bind] at h_spec
  and_intros
  · unfold Spec.decodeInstruction at *; split at * <;> simp_all
  · aesop

  -- Memory 1
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  simp only [Option.some_bind] at h_spec
  and_intros
  · intros; unfold Spec.dataMemoryAccess at *; split at * <;> simp_all
    simp [Spec.dataMemoryAddresses, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at *; simp_all
  · aesop

  -- Memory 2
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  simp only [Option.some_bind] at h_spec
  and_intros
  · intros; unfold Spec.dataMemoryAccess at *; split at * <;> simp_all
    simp [Spec.dataMemoryAddresses, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at *; simp_all
  · aesop

  -- Memory 3
  split at h_spec <;> try contradiction
  simp only [Option.some_bind] at h_spec
  and_intros
  · intros; unfold Spec.dataMemoryAccess at *; split at * <;> simp_all
    simp [Spec.dataMemoryAddresses, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at *; simp_all
  · aesop

  -- Next State
  and_intros
  · constructor
    · unfold Spec.decodeInstruction at *; split at * <;> simp_all
    · simp_all
  · simp_all

    Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition]
  simp only [Option.bind_eq_bind, Option.bind_some] at h_spec
  obtain ⟨rawInstr, h_fetch, decoded, h_decode, v1, h_mem1, v2, h_mem2, v3, h_mem3, h_next⟩ := h_spec

  · unfold Spec.fetchInstruction at h_fetch; split at h_fetch <;> simp_all
  · unfold Spec.decodeInstruction at h_decode; split at h_decode <;> simp_all
  · unfold Spec.dataMemoryAccess at h_mem1; split at h_mem1 <;> simp_all

  · unfold Spec.dataMemoryAccess at h_mem3; split at h_mem3 <;> simp_all
  · constructor
    · unfold Spec.decodeInstruction at h_decode; split at h_decode <;> simp_all
